title: Ability to switch between Sub Item and Item
excerpt:

posts.author: brittom (Thomas Hockey)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to be able to easily click into an Item when in the preview screen of the Sub Item. And then switch back again.

So in the below example, it would be good to have a breadcrumb that took you into the specific Item the Sub Item belongs to, rather than just the Board.

Monday1950×949 91.7 KB
